title: Score-version activity tabs show version-scoped records
description:
As a scorecard operator, I want the score-version detail Procedures and Evaluations tabs to show records associated with the selected score version, so that I can audit optimization and evaluation history for that exact version without waiting on broad scans.

Feature: Score version activity tabs

Scenario: Procedures are scoped to the selected score version
Given a score has multiple versions
And procedures exist for more than one score version
When I open the Procedures tab for one score version
Then I see only procedures associated with that score version
And the query uses the direct indexed association for scoreVersionId.

Scenario: Evaluations are scoped to the selected score version
Given a score has multiple versions
And evaluations exist for more than one score version
When I open the Evaluations tab for one score version
Then I see evaluations associated with that score version
And the query uses the direct indexed association for scoreVersionId.
